findings.finding: Complete security fundamentals. 6 content blocks covering CIA triad, auth vs authz, OWASP Top 10.
findings.details: Good foundation for security module. OWASP coverage current. HTTPS explanation accurate.

findings.finding: Modern Spring Security patterns. 7 content blocks with SecurityFilterChain, BCrypt, form/Basic auth.
findings.details: Uses SecurityFilterChain bean correctly. Password encoding with BCryptPasswordEncoder shown.

findings.finding: Warning block explicitly shows OLD vs NEW patterns
findings.details: Shows OLD (authorizeRequests, antMatchers) vs NEW (authorizeHttpRequests, requestMatchers). Good for migration context.

findings.finding: Challenge notes: 'WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter was removed in Spring Security 6'
Complete session auth coverage. 7 content blocks with SecurityFilterChain, session config, CSRF.
Comprehensive JWT implementation. 7 content blocks covering structure, flow, Spring Security integration.
findings.details: Uses Jwts.builder() and Jwts.parser() patterns. SecretKey generation correct.
Imports: io.jsonwebtoken.Claims, io.jsonwebtoken.Jwts, io.jsonwebtoken.security.Keys - all modern jjwt API
Not using deprecated setSigningKey() pattern. Correct modern parser builder pattern.

findings.finding: Access token vs refresh token distinction covered - production-ready pattern
findings.details: Explains why two tokens are needed and their different lifetimes.

findings.finding: Complete RBAC coverage. 7 content blocks with roles, authorities, @PreAuthorize, method security.
findings.details: Role vs authority distinction clear. @PreAuthorize, @PostAuthorize examples correct.
All authorization examples use current lambda DSL pattern.
